package rulecoverage

func PositiveRequestBodyReadWithoutSizeLimit() string {
    ruleID := "request_body_read_without_size_limit"
    family := "idioms"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "HTTP request bodies read or decoded without an observed size limit such as io.LimitReader or http.MaxBytesReader."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
